title: Square of Sacrifice
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Square of Sacrifice''' was an area of [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]] where mass elaborate executions of prisoners to the [[Yun-Yuuzhan]] took place.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
